signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, BELOW FORECASTS AMID OIL SHOCK | NO | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in prior months, missing market expectations of 2.4% as reported by Trading Economics on or around early April 2026.[1] This uptick, still near the Bank of Korea's 2% target, reflects contained pressures despite glo
